notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG low-MAX basket from approved card HOLLSTEIN-MAX-2021_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; at the first tradable bar of each broker month, average each leg's five largest simple daily returns from the latest 252 completed D1 observations, buy the lower-MAX leg, short the higher-MAX leg, and evaluate the package rather than standalone legs. The source direction is post-financialization-subsample-only and Q02 is a strict out-of-sample falsification.
